name: get_mobile_lwc_offline_analysis
description: Analyzes LWC components for mobile-specific issues and provides detailed recommendations for improvements. Checks if components are mobile-ready.

path.description: Path to component file relative to LWC bundle root

name: get_mobile_lwc_offline_guidance
description: Provides structured review instructions to detect and remediate Mobile Offline code violations in Lightning web components (LWCs) for Salesforce Mobile Apps.

name: create_mobile_lwc_app_review
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC App Review Service, for implementing the App Review feature in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_ar_space_capture
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC AR Space Capture, for implementing AR Space Capture in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_barcode_scanner
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Barcode Scanner, for implementing Barcode Scanner in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_biometrics
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Biometrics Service, for implementing the Biometrics feature in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_calendar
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Calendar Service, for implementing the Calendar feature in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_contacts
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Contacts Service, for implementing the Contacts feature in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_document_scanner
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Document Scanner, for implementing Document Scanner in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_geofencing
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Geofencing Service, for implementing Geofencing in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_location
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Location Service, for implementing Location Services in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_nfc
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC NFC Service, for implementing NFC in an LWC.

name: create_mobile_lwc_payments
description: Provides TypeScript-based API documentation for Salesforce LWC Payments Service, for implementing Payments in an LWC.
